_doc: Cached concall transcript metadata for sentiment scoring. We have full text for ids in '_in_session_text' (fetched and used inline). For unfetched ids, sentiment is derived from concall_search snippets (cached in transcript_ids.json with 'snippet' fields). Re-run macro_pipeline.py rebuild_concall to refresh.
_note: macro_pipeline.py uses a deterministic keyword-based sentiment over the snippet text from the search index when full text is unavailable. Snippets are sufficient for directional signal: count of confidence words (record, strong, growth, beat, robust, healthy, momentum, demand, double-digit, expansion, pleased, exceptional, up, increased, high) minus count of caution words (decline, weak, concern, headwind, slow, soft, challenge, drop, lower, miss, pressure, downturn, cautious, uncertain, delay) normalized to [-1, +1].
